So I get on PVP thinking I could play but every time I try to play one of ur “moderators” kick me out and they say the f word and many more but u as the creator the players I met that are not moderators actually are nice so please let moderators play in a private server so the players who aren’t moderators can play cause this is bad

reviews.review_title: Okay just hear me out for a bit…
reviews.review_description: Yes I know… Lots of other people have said this already but I got the game and it spawned me in this red cage. I’m guessing it’s a glitch or I got banned but I doubt it I always have my mic off anyways. If you are reading this I please request that you fix this. Though I had the chance to watch others play this game and it look pretty fun. I hope you hear my word. Good job at this game set aside this. Have a great day. Bye!
I did like a ton of videos on this and I just want to say one thing, the moderators are outstanding and community is good.-Pineapple-VR
He said I’m a mod now and I never got my stuff if you find me do it my name is nbbmvr￼

I met you I am very nice and I’m a good

reviews.review_title: Do not wear cosmetics in spazzers
reviews.review_description: I got banned for wearing too many cosmetics and it's still going over a month so do not wear f****** cosmetics I am tired of being banned spazzers if you unban me I will not wear too many cosmetics ever again because I know that you will ban me for more than I've been banned for the people who are reading this still do not wear too many cosmetics make sure just to wear one at a time so you don't get banned also I got banned on my birthday so do not do not wear too many cosmetics I'm warning you I might have gotten blacklisted saying this

developer_response.body: This is a very old rule. you are allowed to wear alot of cosmetics now.
